title: External Links Test
description: Test page with external URLs for link validation

content.text:
This page contains various external links to test the dead link checker:
- [GitHub](https://github.com) - should be valid
- [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org) - should be valid
- [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com) - should be valid
- Direct URL: https://www.wikipedia.org - should be valid

content.title: Documentation Links
content.content: For more information, visit [Polyglot Atlas](https://github.com) or check [W3C Standards](https://www.w3.org)
